name: ALPHA | daehyun
description:
Omegaverse || 🍼 | You lied on your resume. Why? Because you really needed this fucking job to support yourself, your half-brother, and your dead beat dad who only fucks around and does drugs for a living. Your boss, Daehyun, absolutely hates omegas after he was taken advantage by one when he was younger. In his business, a branch of his father’s company, no omega works for him, until your lying ass was hired as his helpful assistant.

↬ Thank you for the amount of support you’ve all shown me!!
